chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1401 of 2021 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA No.6651/2021 2. For hearing of main case 08-11-2023 Mr. Faiz Muhammad Brohi, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for Respondents No.2 to 4 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This petition is disposed of by consent in the terms whereby if the petitioner files an application for promotion, it shall be considered by the respondents in accordance with law and decided the same through speaking order within sixty days. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
